summary: Tested Draft Creation (Part A) and Review Reminder (Part B) features. Draft functionality for Orders works correctly - create, update, submit. UI shows Save Draft + Submit Request buttons. Drafts appear in My Requests with Draft badge. One issue found: drafts don't appear in general orders list for Admin role (by design, but may need UX clarification).

minor.issue: Drafts excluded from general list for Admin role - only visible with status=Draft filter. This is by design but may confuse users.
is_draft parameter not implemented - frontend sends it but backend ignores it. Feature/Bug drafts not supported yet.
Admin role cannot pick orders - only Editor role can. Role mapping may need review.

passed_tests: Backend: Create draft order with is_draft=true -> status='Draft', sla_deadline=null
Backend: Submit draft via POST /orders/{id}/submit -> status='Open', sla_deadline set
Backend: Drafts not in order pool (GET /orders/pool)
Backend: Draft owner can access draft by ID
Backend: review_started_at field exists in OrderResponse model
Backend: last_requester_message_at field exists in OrderResponse model
Backend: review_reminder service integrated in background task loop
Frontend: Command Center loads with Create New Request and My Requests tabs
Frontend: Category selection shows L1 and L2 dropdowns
Frontend: Save Draft and Submit Request buttons appear after category selection
Frontend: Draft saved successfully with toast 'Draft saved! You can continue editing later.'
Frontend: Drafts appear in My Requests with Draft badge and 'Click to continue editing' text
Frontend: Draft Editor page loads with all form fields
Frontend: Submit Draft button works - changes status to Open with toast 'Request submitted successfully!'
action_items: Consider adding is_draft support to feature-requests and bug-reports endpoints for consistency
Review if Admin should see drafts in general orders list or if current behavior (filter by status=Draft) is acceptable
Document that review_started_at is set when order status changes to Pending via submit-for-review endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: Draft functionality for Orders is well implemented with proper SLA handling
review_started_at and last_requester_message_at fields properly tracked for review reminder workflow
Role mapping in require_roles() uses ROLE_ALIASES for backward compatibility
Feature/Bug reports don't support drafts yet - frontend sends is_draft but backend ignores it
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test draft orders (RRG-000003 to RRG-000015) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Draft functionality for Orders is working. Key endpoints: POST /orders with is_draft=true, PUT /orders/{id}/draft, POST /orders/{id}/submit. Drafts have status='Draft' and sla_deadline=null until submitted. Review reminder service runs in background loop checking for Pending orders. Feature/Bug reports don't support drafts yet.

part_b_review_reminder.pending_status_workflow: NOT FULLY TESTED (requires Editor role to pick order)
